revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template automatically categorizes pages into [[:Category:Templates used by AutoWikiBrowser]]. This categorization can be suppressed with {{para|nocat|yes}} or similar.
==See also== * {{tl|Bot use warning}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:AutoWikiBrowser|standard installation]] [[Category:Template namespace templates]] [[Category:Courtesy templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template automatically categorizes pages into [[:Category:Templates used by AutoWikiBrowser]]. This categorization can be suppressed with {{para|nocat|yes}} or similar.
==See also== * {{tl|Bot use warning}}

<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template automatically categorizes pages into [[:Category:Templates used by AutoWikiBrowser]]. This categorization can be suppressed with {{para|nocat|yes}} or similar.

<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template automatically categorizes pages into [[:Category:Templates used by AutoWikiBrowser]]. This categorization can be suppressed with {{para|nocat|yes}} or similar.

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=AWB_standard_installation%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=AWB_standard_installation%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template automatically categorizes pages into [[:Category:Templates used by AutoWikiBrowser]]. This categorization can be suppressed with {{para|nocat|yes}} or similar.
==See also== * {{tl|Bot use warning}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:AutoWikiBrowser|standard installation]] [[Category:Template namespace templates]] [[Category:Courtesy templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
